summary: Decent but unremarkable show with lukewarm recording; Jerry appears half‑in, half‑out.
review: The concert is described as a decent, average night with no standout moments. Reviewers note that Jerry Garcia seemed only partially engaged and there are no specific comments about the audio source or sound quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Three reviews skew low (0‑2 stars) with one modest 3‑star comment; minimal detail makes the rating uncertain but overall impression is below average.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention soundboard, audience, or any specific audio characteristics.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Listeners describe the performance as average with no notable peaks or lows; overall vibe is unremarkable.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Appears half‑in, half‑out according to one reviewer.
